services.title: Full-Stack Web Services
services.subtitle: From landing pages to complex web applications — we engineer digital experiences that drive results.
services.item_1_desc: Technical SEO from the ground up. Schema markup, Core Web Vitals optimization, semantic HTML, and structured data that search engines love.
services.item_2_desc: Generative Engine Optimization for AI search (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini). Entity-based content structures and AI-indexable markup.
services.item_3_desc: Native internationalization with hreflang tags, locale-aware routing, and professional translations. Reach every market.
services.item_4_desc: Near-perfect Lighthouse scores. Sub-2s load times. Optimized assets, lazy loading, and CDN strategies for blazing-fast delivery.
services.item_5_desc: Pixel-perfect across all devices. Mobile-first architecture with fluid layouts that look stunning from phone to 4K.
services.item_6_desc: Clean, maintainable code using Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, React, or Next.js — chosen for your project, built to last.
services.item_7_desc: Professional email setup via Gmail — send & receive from your own domain (noreply@yourdomain.com). Branded, reliable, and hassle-free.
services.item_8_desc: Contact forms that save submissions to Google Sheets and auto-reply with a branded email — "We'll get back to you shortly." Zero friction, full data control.
services.item_9_desc: Your site protected by Cloudflare — DDoS protection, SSL/TLS encryption, WAF firewall. Trusted by millions of websites worldwide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: What's the difference between Option A and Option B?
faq.a1: Option A uses pre-built templates customised with your branding, colors, and content — fast and affordable. Option B is a fully bespoke website designed from scratch to your exact vision, with complete creative freedom.
faq.q2: Can I try before I buy?
faq.a2: Yes! Use the live Demo to preview and customise your Option A website. Pick colors, fonts, and business type, then send your preferences directly to us.
faq.a3: Option A is a monthly subscription that covers hosting, maintenance, and support. Option B has a one-time setup fee plus Rp 1.500.000/year for ongoing maintenance and updates.
faq.q4: Does the price include a domain?
faq.a4: Domain registration and renewal are billed separately — the domain belongs to you. We guide you through the process and help you pick the right domain.
faq.q5: How fast can my site go live?
faq.a5: Option A sites typically go live within 3–7 business days after we receive your content. Option B timelines depend on complexity — usually 2–4 weeks.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Honest answers to the questions Indonesian business owners ask most when getting a professional website.
faq.q1: How much does a website cost in Indonesia?
faq.a1: Website costs in Indonesia vary widely depending on complexity. A simple company profile website starts from Rp 500,000 to Rp 2,000,000. An online store with shopping cart and payment features starts from Rp 3,000,000 to Rp 10,000,000. For a full custom website with complete features, prices can reach Rp 15,000,000 or more. Web人 Indonesia offers affordable packages with premium results equivalent to websites costing far more. Free consultation is available to help you choose the right package.
faq.q2: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a2: Build time depends on project complexity. A simple company profile website can be completed in 3–7 business days. An online store with 10–50 products typically takes 1–2 weeks. Custom websites with full features or web applications require 2–4 weeks or more. Timelines are discussed together at the start so expectations are aligned.
faq.q3: Do I need to know coding to manage the website?
faq.a3: Not at all. Every website built by Web人 Indonesia comes with a user-friendly management dashboard. You can update content, photos, and products yourself without writing a single line of code. We also provide tutorials and complete documentation in Indonesian so you feel comfortable managing your own website.
faq.q4: Can the website appear on Google (SEO)?
faq.a4: Yes, every website we build is SEO-optimized from the ground up. We implement technical SEO, schema markup (FAQPage, LocalBusiness, Organization), semantic HTML, Core Web Vitals optimization, and proper meta tags for Google. For Indonesian local businesses, we also optimize Google Business Profile and local SEO so your business is easier to find by potential customers in your area.
faq.q5: What's the difference between web design and web development?
faq.a5: Web design focuses on visual appearance and user experience (UX/UI) — colors, typography, and layout. Web development focuses on the code behind the website that makes all features work. Web人 Indonesia provides both: professional designers for attractive and compelling visuals, and experienced developers for clean, fast code that is easy to extend in the future.
faq.q6: Can you build a full-featured online store?
faq.a6: Absolutely. Web人 Indonesia specializes in building full-featured online stores: product catalog, shopping cart, checkout, payment integration (Midtrans, Bank Transfer, GoPay, OVO, Dana), order tracking, and an admin dashboard for inventory management. We also provide Google Sheets integration for automatic order recording and automatic confirmation emails to customers.
faq.q7: Why choose Web人 Indonesia over other providers?
faq.a7: Web人 Indonesia combines three core strengths: (1) Indonesian SEO that genuinely improves your business ranking on Google, (2) GEO and AIO optimization so your website also appears in AI answers like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE, and (3) native i18n that lets your website display in Indonesian and English with search engine-friendly hreflang tags. The result — a website that is not just beautiful to look at but also genuinely brings in real customers.
faq.a8: Yes, all communication with Web人 Indonesia can be done entirely in Indonesian. Free consultation, proposal presentations, development process, and after-sales technical support are all available in Indonesian. We understand the needs of Indonesian local businesses and use terminology familiar to Indonesian entrepreneurs.
